etymology.description: semantic 止(止) (zhǐ, "foot") + phonetic 舟(舟) (zhōu) -> moving forward (by foot on a boat)
etymology.interpretation: Originally, 歬 (qián) ("advance, move forward") combined a foot 止(止) (zhǐ, "foot") and a boat 舟(舟) (zhōu, "boat") to symbolize movement, as one would advance by stepping onto a boat. This imagery conveys the concept of advancing or moving forward in a dynamic, physical manner.
